title: Become a Full-Stack Reverse-engineer(In only 3 short years)
snippet: Become a Full-Stack Reverse-engineer(In only 3 short years)Thanks for @daeken. You’ve always inspired me.What this isThis is a roadmap to becoming capable of working at any level of abstraction in software. It won’t make you an expert reverse-engineer, breaker of things, kernel developer, compile...
